\tzpentry{ID4297}{Vector Potential Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4297 introduces Vector Potential Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[
$\vec{A}_{dip}(\vec{r},t) = \frac{\mu_0}{4\pi}\frac{\vec{\mu}_{eff} \times \vec{r}}{r^3}$
\]
